thoughts_kody_engine_clijs_568712180095.content: ensureFeatureBranchIfNeeded only synced base branch when prNumber was set — it never checked out the PR head branch, so pipeline ran on wrong branch.

thoughts_kody_engine_568714245476.content: The fix target is the compiled engine at node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js, not source. Must also add prHeadBranch to ctx.input.

facts_kody_engine_patch_strategy_5687154.content: When patching a dependency's compiled output, both the context population and the function logic must be updated together.

conventions_kody_engine_pr_context_56871.content: PR details from getPRDetails include both baseBranch and headBranch — both must be stored in ctx.input and used together.
